note: Daily chained index of the Claude portfolio vs SPY / QQQ. Portfolio daily return = weighted (today_close / prior_close - 1) over current holdings, chained onto the prior index; rebased to 100 at base_date. Benchmarks rebased to 100 at the first captured close. Appended by .github/workflows/update-performance.yml (06:30 JST). Not investment advice.
